name: Faadu
overview: Set in the year of the Indian economic meltdown, Abhay, an angry poet and dreamer from the dusty chawl of Kanjurmarg, aspires for a rags-to-riches story for himself. In this ambitious journey, he falls in love with Manjiri, a poetess with a starkly different view on life.

trailers.title: Faadu - A Love Story | Sony LIV Originals | Pavail Gulati, Saiyami Kher, Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari
